summary: This is a brief announcement post promoting an upcoming Alt Banking meeting where members will watch and discuss 'Four Horsemen,' a documentary by Renegade Economists. The post provides logistical details including time, location at Columbia University, and how to join the email list. Rather than offering analysis or argument, it serves as a community organizing notice for the Occupy Wall Street-affiliated alternative banking group.
key_points: Alt Banking OWS group is hosting a documentary screening instead of their usual meeting format
The film 'Four Horsemen' is available both on YouTube for free and for purchase ($5 download)
The meeting is open to newcomers who can join via email list or the Alt Banking webpage
money_quotes: We're having a special Alt Banking meeting where, instead of having our usual format, we're all watching Four Horsemen
key_insight: This post functions as community organizing outreach rather than substantive analysis, reflecting the author's involvement in grassroots economic reform movements.
